summary: Enhanced Address Fields Feature Testing - ALL BACKEND TESTS PASSED (16/16). Fixed BUG in Agency CRUD - missing address fields in create/get/update endpoints. UI verification confirmed all address fields present in Doctor/Medical/Agency forms with working State/District cascade.

fixed.issue: Agency create, get, and update endpoints were missing address_line_1, address_line_2, delivery_station, transport_id, birthday, anniversary fields
fixed.fix_applied: Updated server.py to include all address fields in agency CRUD operations

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - minor accessibility issue (existing issue)

critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fixed: Agency CRUD endpoints were missing enhanced address fields (address_line_1, address_line_2, delivery_station, transport_id) - now fixed
State/District cascade working correctly - selecting state fetches districts via /api/public/districts/{state}
Order update modal auto-fill feature implemented correctly in openUpdateModal() - fetches customer data and pre-fills delivery_station and transport_id if not already set on order
All enhanced address fields properly added to Doctor and Medical models and CRUD operations
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed agency CRUD endpoints to include all address fields
/app/backend/tests/test_address_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for address features
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced address fields feature fully tested and working. Key components: 1) /api/public/states returns 36 Indian states/UTs, 2) /api/public/districts/{state} returns districts for selected state, 3) Doctor/Medical/Agency forms have Address Line 1 & 2, State dropdown, District dropdown (cascading), Pincode, Delivery Station, Transport dropdown, 4) Orders update modal auto-fills delivery_station and transport from customer preferences when status changed to Ready to Despatch. Bug in Agency CRUD has been fixed.

districts_api.details: Returns districts based on state selection, empty array for invalid state

doctor_address_fields.details: Create, Read, Update with all address fields (address_line_1, address_line_2, state, district, pincode, delivery_station, transport_id)

agency_address_fields.details: BUG FIXED - Create, Get, Update now include all address fields
agency_address_fields.bug_fixed: server.py lines 1729-1793, 1851-1924 updated to include missing fields

doctor_form_ui.details: Form shows Address Details section with Address Line 1, 2, State dropdown, District dropdown (cascading), Pincode, Delivery Preferences section with Delivery Station and Transport dropdown

medical_form_ui.details: Form shows all address fields with state/district cascade

agency_form_ui.details: Form shows all address fields with state/district cascade

state_district_cascade_ui.details: Selecting state populates district dropdown, District says 'Select state first' when no state selected

order_update_modal.details: Shows Delivery Station and Transport fields when status changed to Ready to Despatch

order_auto_fill.details: openUpdateModal function fetches customer data and pre-fills delivery_station and transport_id if not already set on order (verified via code review - lines 192-231 in Orders.jsx)

mocked_apis.WhatsApp: WhatsApp notifications use external BotMasterSender webhook - cannot verify delivery
